summary: Iteration 236: Complete testing of App Launcher, Global Branded Loader, and Notification Preferences features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

tests: AppLauncher shows on every fresh page load (no sessionStorage)
AppLauncher displays branded triad animation (nodes, lines, glow)
Wordmark 'Konekt' and tagline 'Business Procurement Simplified' fade in
AppLauncher completes in ~2.4s and removes from DOM
Login page renders correctly after launcher completes
AppLoader component has data-testid='app-loader'
AppLoader displays branded triad SVG with pulse animation
AppLoader used in dashboard loading states
GET /api/notifications/preferences returns correct structure for admin
Admin role receives 4 events: admin_sales_override, admin_delay_flagged, weekly_report, alert_critical
Events grouped into Approvals, Alerts, Reports
PUT /api/notifications/preferences saves toggle changes
GET after PUT reflects saved changes
Settings Hub Notifications tab shows System-Wide Notifications toggles
Settings Hub Notifications tab shows Notification Preferences section
Toggle buttons work for APP, EMAIL, WA channels
GET /api/notifications/preferences returns correct catalog for customer
Customer role receives 8 events: order_created, payment_verified, payment_approved, payment_rejected, order_in_fulfillment, order_dispatched, order_delivered, order_delayed
Events grouped into Order Updates, Payments, Alerts
Each event has correct structure (event_key, label, in_app, email, whatsapp)
GET /api/notifications/preferences returns correct catalog for sales_manager
Sales Manager receives events: admin_sales_override, admin_delay_flagged, weekly_report, alert_critical
GET /api/notifications/preferences returns correct catalog for finance_manager
Finance Manager receives events: admin_delay_flagged, weekly_report, alert_critical
GET /api/notifications/preferences returns correct catalog for vendor
Vendor receives event: vendor_order_assigned
Admin login creates welcome notification with title 'Welcome back'
Customer login creates welcome notification with title 'Welcome to Konekt'
Welcome notification has CTA 'Open Dashboard' with correct target_url
Welcome notification is one-time (no duplicate on second login)
Sales Manager login creates welcome notification
Welcome notification visible in notification bell dropdown
Admin notification bell shows notifications dropdown
Customer notification bell shows welcome notification
Unread count endpoint returns correct count
Mark all read endpoint works
No console errors across admin portal
No console errors across customer portal

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 236 verified: (1) App Launcher shows on EVERY page load/refresh (no sessionStorage, uses React state only). (2) Notification Preferences fully wired - GET/PUT /api/notifications/preferences endpoints work, EVENT_CATALOG has 18 events, ROLE_DEFAULTS for 7 roles. (3) Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has Notifications tab with System-Wide Notifications toggles AND NotificationPreferencesSection. (4) Welcome notifications are one-time, role-aware, use recipient_user_id field. (5) Preference enforcement: in_app_notification_service checks prefs before creating notification (skip_pref_check param available).
